form.formComment: Hit the ground running with a slick early sectional but ran over late and missed the frame when a 1.3 lengths fourth (23.49) over 410m at this track. Unbeaten in two starts from this box. Key runner.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Slow to begin; Checked and contacted in back straight.

form.formComment: Recorded the fastest time on the card after running them ragged to make it two in a row at Ballarat over 390m (22.20). In hot form and expected to go close again.

form.formComment: Failed to finish the race over 400m at Geelong last start. Prior to that was beaten 0.8 lengths over 400m at Warragul in a Grade 5. Needs to find a bit more to test these.

form.formComment: Came from wide draw and finished 4th in a Grade 5 on April 3 over 400m at Geelong behind Paw Varner beaten 9 lengths (23.30). Not up to this.

form.formComment: After failing to finish two starts back she came out and won by 0.8 lengths at Warrnambool (22.55) beating Belair Blue in a Grade 5 on March 30. Predicted to struggle on this occasion.

form.formComment: Good effort to win last start by a neck over 460m at Geelong in a handy (26.08), beating Ticket Confetti. Will find this a bit tougher, not one of the leading chances on this occasion.

form.formComment: Was out of placings last time (25.74) at Shepparton in a Grade 5, finishing fifth and beaten 9 lengths. Strong record off the draw with three wins and two minors from six starts. Looks suited here and rates a leading chance.
